title: iva texensis
intro: Iva texensis, also known as Texas marsh-elder or elder bush, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States, particularly in wetland areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and fever. The health benefits of Iva texensis include its ability to reduce swelling, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Iva texensis can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems and menstrual cramps.
